item.description:
Release v4.19.0

Changes since v4.18.0

  • feat: add elegant macOS-style Loading page
  • feat: refactor LLM provider base classes and fix Keychain service regression
  • feat(core): extract KeychainKit as independent package
  • feat(editor-chat): add EditorChatPlugin for sending code references to chat
  • feat(goal-task): add chat toolbar button to display goals
  • feat(goal-task): enforce single active goal policy
  • feat(menu-bar): sort menu bar popup items by order
  • feat(plugin): allow agentTools to throw and surface failures to UI
  • fix(menu-bar): honor LumiMenuBarPopupItem.order when aggregating popup items
  • refactor: move plugin-related types to Plugin directory
  • refactor(agent-tool): extract tool service methods into AgentToolComponent
  • refactor(app): simplify RootContainer and rename project types
  • refactor(bootstrap): merge LumiCoreService into RootContainer
  • refactor(core): introduce ProjectComponent to encapsulate ProjectState
  • refactor(core): remove KeychainKit dependency from LumiLLMProvider protocol
  • refactor(core): remove LumiCoreKit Security module, use KeychainKit directly
  • refactor(goal-task): simplify sidebar to show single active goal
  • refactor(layout): introduce LayoutComponent to encapsulate LumiLayoutState
  • refactor(logo): rename LogoRegistry to LogoComponent, migrate to component pattern
  • refactor(plugins): surface agentTools dependency failures instead of silent returns
